svg.desc: Component: Sidebar — Expanded state Page: All authenticated pages (AppShell) Design system version: 3.14 (2026-03-25) Artboards: desktop 1440px (shown at 900px viewport representation)

g.text: Can you analyze this dataset and
I've analyzed the dataset. Here are the key findings:
• Columns A–C show a 23% null rate above the expected
5% threshold — likely a data pipeline gap.
• Row 4,821 contains an outlier in column F (value: 99,999)
